Caption: DFN evaluation for the D − OE for 2 Monte Carlo samples of the parameter vector. Dark blue shows the DFN model result and cyan shows the PCE surrogate models' prediction. A total of 1000 Monte Carlo validation samples, distinct from the training set, were generated and evaluated per OE. Of these 8000 simulations, the PCE prediction has a maximum relative error >1 % in <50 cases. An error histogram for this validation can be found in the supplementary materials. (For interpretation of the references to color in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the web version of this article.)
